name: Nursing Care
description: Professional nursing care at home. Qualified nurses for post-surgery care, wound dressing, injections, and general patient monitoring.

name: Lab Test at Home
description: Get blood tests, urine tests, and other diagnostics done at your doorstep. Reports delivered online. No need to visit a lab.

name: Rental Cars
description: Self-drive and chauffeur-driven car rentals. Hourly, daily, or weekly. Sedans, SUVs, and luxury options available.

name: Physiotherapy at Home
description: Certified physiotherapists for recovery, mobility, and pain relief. Sessions tailored to your condition and schedule.

name: Elder Care
description: Companion and caregiving support for seniors. Medication reminders, mobility assistance, and daily care at home.

name: Home Cleaning
description: Deep cleaning, regular housekeeping, and post-move cleaning. Trained staff and eco-friendly products.
